Breakfast.name: Poha
Breakfast.description: A savory rice flake dish made with turmeric, mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts.

Breakfast.name: Aloo Paratha
Breakfast.description: A stuffed flatbread made with whole wheat flour and filled with spiced mashed potatoes.

Breakfast.name: Dosa
Breakfast.description: A thin, crispy pancake made from fermented rice and urad dal batter, often served with chutney and sambar.

Breakfast.name: Idli
Breakfast.description: Steamed rice cakes made from a fermented batter of rice and urad dal, typically served with sambar and chutney.

Breakfast.name: Upma
Breakfast.description: A savory dish made from semolina, vegetables, and mustard seeds, often served as a breakfast or snack.

Lunch.name: Butter Chicken
Lunch.description: A rich and creamy chicken curry made with tomatoes, cream, and various Indian spices.

Lunch.name: Biryani
Lunch.description: A fragrant rice dish cooked with meat (usually chicken, mutton, or beef), basmati rice, and spices.

Lunch.name: Chole Bhature
Lunch.description: A North Indian dish consisting of spicy chickpeas (chole) and fried bread (bhature).

Lunch.name: Rajma
Lunch.description: A curry made with kidney beans, tomatoes, and spices, usually served with rice.

Lunch.name: Palak Paneer
Lunch.description: A curry made with paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cooked in a smooth spinach gravy.

Dinner.name: Dal Tadka
Dinner.description: A popular lentil dish made with yellow dal cooked with tomatoes, onions, and spices.

Dinner.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
Dinner.description: Grilled chicken pieces cooked in a creamy, spiced tomato-based gravy.

Dinner.name: Naan
Dinner.description: A soft, leavened Indian flatbread, often served with curries and gravies.

Dinner.name: Malai Kofta
Dinner.description: Fried dumplings made from mashed potatoes and paneer, cooked in a creamy, spiced gravy.

Dinner.name: Matar Pulao
Dinner.description: A simple, fragrant rice dish cooked with peas, cumin seeds, and whole spices.

Snacks.name: Samosa
Snacks.description: Deep-fried pastry filled with spiced potatoes, peas, and sometimes meat.

Snacks.name: Pani Puri
Snacks.description: Small, hollow puris filled with spicy, tangy water, potatoes, and chickpeas.

Snacks.name: Bhel Puri
Snacks.description: A puffed rice snack mixed with tamarind chutney, onions, tomatoes, and sev.

Snacks.name: Vada Pav
Snacks.description: A popular Mumbai street food consisting of a spicy potato fritter (vada) in a bun (pav).

Snacks.name: Dhokla
Snacks.description: A steamed, spongy snack made from fermented rice and chickpea flour, often served with chutneys.

Desserts.name: Gulab Jamun
Desserts.description: Sweet, deep-fried dough balls soaked in sugar syrup, often flavored with rose water or cardamom.

Desserts.name: Rasgulla
Desserts.description: Soft, spongy balls made from chhena (Indian cottage cheese) soaked in sugary syrup.

Desserts.name: Jalebi
Desserts.description: A deep-fried dessert made from flour, soaked in sugar syrup and often served hot.

Desserts.name: Kheer
Desserts.description: A creamy rice pudding made with milk, rice, sugar, and flavored with cardamom and nuts.

Desserts.name: Ladoo
Desserts.description: Sweet, round confections made from various ingredients like chickpea flour, semolina, and jaggery.
